title: Distinguish the Cheiro mapping from the modern Pythagorean label

positions.summary: Use the selected 1–8 letter mapping with explicit Cheiro provenance and per-character trace.
Use the repeating 1–9 mapping as a modern project policy without attributing it to Cheiro.

default_policy.rationale: The compatibility default remains unchanged while the caller can explicitly select the historically sourced Cheiro mapping.

user_disclosure: The two letter mappings are isolated lineages. Selecting one never blends values or historical claims from the other.
